final:
module RefModule(
    input [3:0] num1,
    input [3:0] num2,
    input op,
    output reg [3:0] result // Changed from wire to reg
);always @(*) begin
  wire [3:0] _tap_num1 = num1 & {4{1'b1}};

        if(op == 0) begin // addition
            result = num1 + num2;
        end else begin // subtraction
            result = num1 - num2;
        end
    end

endmodule
